features: Package Includes: 24 pieces (12 pairs) sparkly hair clips. Crowns, butterflies, stars, and heart-shaped barrettes in various styles make girls more cute and charming, and they can control different shapes and outfits.
Appropriate size: The length of each non-slip hair clip is about 6.5cm/2.6inches, the small size is very suitable for wearing, making girls more delicate and beautiful.

High Quality: These cute hair clips are made of high-quality leather and sequins, the smooth and shiny material is very shiny and eye-catching, and the durable clips are very strong and not easy to fall off.

Widely used: Our hair clips are suitable for all hair types, no matter thick, thin, straight or curly hair, they are also very suitable for clampping bangs, organizing broken hair and creating a perfect hairstyle. Suitable for various occasions, such as parties, weddings, proms, travel and daily life.

Wonderful Gift: These cute hair clips are the perfect gift for your daughter, sister, girlfriend. It is a birthday, children's day and Christmas gift that girls love. It can make girls shine, beautiful and confident in daily life.
description: Product description -Package Includes: 24 pieces (12 pairs) sparkly hair clips -Specifications: Material: Leather and sequins Styles: Star, heart, butterfly, crown Length: Approx. 6.5cm/2.6inches Directions To use, gently open the clip, position it in the desired section of hair, and close the clip to secure. For optimal results, consider hair type and clip style when placing and adjust as needed.
